title: 日経賞の後に・花弁、ひらり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has finished the Nikkei Sho. Zenno
Rob Roy, who was cheering Rice Shower on from
the stands, visits her afterward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says Rice Shower is like a hero from a book,
always moving forward toward her goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, though embarrassed, is delighted to
hear she's come closer to becoming a blue rose.
